home.subtitle: I love building beautiful, user-friendly UIs with TypeScript and React. I share my learnings through blog posts.

about.title: About
about.bio: Hi, I'm HarutarouKawamoto. I'm learning frontend development focused on TypeScript and React. I'm passionate about designing and implementing intuitive, beautiful UIs, and I aim to grow as an engineer through continuous learning and sharing knowledge.
